_notes: Use a read-only Postgres user (dispositivo_ro) for MCP connections.
For writes, use the application API, not the MCP server directly.

Create the read-only user with: CREATE USER dispositivo_ro WITH PASSWORD 'readonly'; GRANT CONNECT ON DATABASE dispositivo TO dispositivo_ro; GRANT USAGE ON SCHEMA public TO dispositivo_ro; GRANT SELECT ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO dispositivo_ro; ALTER DEFAULT PRIVILEGES IN SCHEMA public GRANT SELECT ON TABLES TO dispositivo_ro;
